allow: PowerShell(docker exec clinica-psicologia-db-1 mysql -ularavel_user -plaravel_password clinica_psicologia_db -e "DESCRIBE psicologos;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed port 3000")
